rule: 4v4 is the hockey load; dryland is support.

rule: Lacrosse is hard sport load; use mobility/touches only.

logging: Hours on ice, energy, soreness, confidence.

allowedWork: WU-10 before, MOB-15 after, light skill.

rule: Fresh legs and confidence are the goal.
